roa.docketEntryComment: PD MOTION TO MODIFY CONDITIONS OF RELEASE FILED
DEF MOT TO MODIFY CONDITIONS OF RELEASE FILED

/CAL:ADD ON TO CALENDAR FOR SUBSTITUTION OF COUNSEL/INTC/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER, SEIYA JOHNSON, IS RELIEVED,/X:PRIVATE COUNSEL, JAMES BUSTAMANTE, APPEARING AND SUBSTITUTING IN AS COUNSEL OF RECORD,/VD:THE LAST DAY OF 06-12-20/GTW/CONTD:TO SET JURY TRIAL/DOP/VD:JURY TRIAL ON 05-29-20/
/CAL:PD MOTION TO MODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS/INTC/MO GRTD/CTORD: SCRAM DEVICE IS TO BE REMOVED FROM THE DEFENDANT AND SCRAM CONDITIONS TERMINATED/X:FUTURE DATES CONFIRMED/
/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/GTW/CONTD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE-S23 ANDTO SET TRIAL-S22/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN:GABINO LUCENA;     /EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1 -PAGE WITH 2 PHOTOS OF GABINO LUCENA ON FLOOR; PEOPLE'S 2 - PAGE 2 PHOTOS OF GABINO LUCENA ON FLOOR WITH CLOSE UP OF FACE IN ONE SHOT; DEFENSE A - PHOTO OF INDIVIDUAL HOLDING 2 HANDS OUT; PEOPLE'S 3 - MEDICAL RECORDS FROM KAISER HOSPITAL/EXHM:DEFENSE B - EMAIL 1-14-19/SATERM/SAORD/SA1:DO NOT HARASS GABINO LUCENA/EXHRET/X:DEFENSE MAKES MOTION TO REMOVE SCRAM DEVICE/MODENIED/HTA1:1 AS WELL AS ALLEGATION PURSUANT TO 12022,7(E) ; 2 AS WELL ASALLEGATION PURSUANT TO 12022,7(E) ; 3 AS WELL AS ALLEGATION PURSUANT TO 1192,7(C)(8)/OR/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/INTC/STWPX/X:VICTIM IS VOIR DIRED BY THE PEOPLE,/X:COURT DENIES VICTIM'S REQUEST TO MODIFY THE CPO AND TO HAVE SCRAM  DEVICE REMOVED,/CONT/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/OR/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT TO ATTTEND 3 AA AND NA MEETINGS PER WEEK/ /X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE,THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH  GPS AND SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD,/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/NTW60/LDPX:01-14-19/987,2/SAORD/SA1:GABINO LURENA/SA2:51 COLLING WOOD STREET/SAORD3/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET JURY TRIAL/DAWT/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE 04-07-22 AND TO SETJURY TRIAL 04-21-22/
/CAL:FINAL TO SET JURY TRIAL OR DISPO/977/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE IN D23 & TO SET TRIAL IN D22/DAWF/
/CAL: TO SET JURY TRIAL/DAWT/CONTD: TO SET OR DISPO/
/CAL: PTC/X: COURT CONFIRMS FUTURE HEARING DATE,/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 16/TRANS 16:FORTHWITH FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/
/CAL:PHC/INTC/CTORD:ELECTONIC MONITORING REQUIREMENT IS REMOVED/TE:3 HOURS/CONTD TO BE SET, DOP OR DAW/CONTD:TO SET/DOP(ORDAWF)/
/CAL:DEFT'S MOT TO MODIFY CONDITIONS OF RELEASE/INTC/DOP/X:CONFIRM HEARING DATE OF 02-27-19/
